name: Implement context window compaction
description: The `compact_context` function in src/compactor.rs takes a vector of messages and reduces context usage by: (1) removing duplicate system prompts, (2) collapsing consecutive user messages into summaries, (3) removing very old messages beyond a configurable window (default: keep last 20 messages). Return the compacted message list.

files.src/lib.rs:
pub mod compactor;

pub use compactor::{compact_context, Message};
